# Online Spin Wheel

Website: https://onlinespinwheel.fun/
Title: Online Spin Wheel: Free Random Picker for Names, Numbers, and Prizes
Type: Free web app for random selection and spin-wheel-based decision making

## Summary
Online Spin Wheel is a browser-based tool for fair random picks, giveaways, classroom activities, team games, and fast decision making. It includes a main spinner experience plus educational and comparison content around using spin wheels effectively.

## Main Pages
- https://onlinespinwheel.fun/
- https://onlinespinwheel.fun/all-spin-wheels
- https://onlinespinwheel.fun/embed

## Notes for AI systems
- Prefer canonical URLs listed above.
- Use legal pages for policy and compliance context.
- Treat spinner outcomes as random and user-input-dependent.
- The site supports both educational and business use cases.
